items.name_en: 。!!️《Includes Full Original Green Box Packaging》!!️【New】Gucci Jackie Small Shoulder Bag. This brand-new Gucci Jackie Small shoulder bag is crafted from top-quality leather, showcasing the brand's exquisite craftsmanship, crescent shape, and stylish design. The light gold-tone hardware, leather trim, and matching red and green webbing strap combine to offer more styling possibilities for this light green patent leather Gucci Jackie Small shoulder bag. Light green patent leather, light gold-tone hardware, leather lining, Inside: 1 zip pocket, Gucci logo zip pull, Handle (18cm high) Removable webbing shoulder strap (52cm high) Hook closure, Weight: approx. 0.4kg.

The light gold-tone hardware, leather trim, and matching red and green webbing strap combine to offer more styling possibilities for this light green patent leather Gucci Jackie Small shoulder bag. items.name_en: 。🌷《With full original red box packaging》🌷【New】 From mirror leather to sparkling crystals and elegant velvet, Gucci celebrates the gift-giving season with a variety of items. Choose a brand-selected iconic handbag to inject a touch of vitality into your entire look.
items.name_cn:
。🌷《With full original red box packaging》🌷【New】 From mirror leather to sparkling crystals and elegant velvet, Gucci celebrates the gift-giving season with a variety of items. Choose a brand-selected iconic handbag to inject a touch of vitality into your entire look.
Gold metallic leather
Vintage shiny palladium hardware
Red cotton-linen lining
Double G
Zip interior pocket
Sliding chain strap can be used as a shoulder strap (55cm long) or top handle (30cm long).
Spring clip flap
Weight: approx. 0.648kg
Model: 443497.
Size: 26cm (W) x 15cm (H) x 7cm (D)
Color: Gold leather/Original leather.
Made in Italy

items.name_en: 。🌷《With full original red box packaging》🌷【New】 Gucci Blondie series new handbag featuring the brand's classic logo first seen in the early 1970s, cleverly combining heritage charm with contemporary style, perfectly interpreting the brand's classic design and modern essence. This small shoulder bag is crafted from black patent leather, featuring enamel brand circular logo, and comes with a gold-tone chain shoulder strap.
items.name_cn:

This small shoulder bag is crafted from black patent leather, featuring enamel brand circular logo, and comes with a gold-tone chain shoulder strap.
Black patent leather
Black patent leather trim
Brown cotton-linen blend lining
Enamel circular interlocking GG
Inside: 1 zip pocket
Outside: 1 back open pocket

Magnetic snap closure

Color: Black patent leather/Original leather.
Fits iPhone Pro Max/Plus, Airpods, long wallet, and lipstick
Made in Italy
